basic_details.job_title: IIM Ahmedabad Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Post Doctoral Research Associate
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIM Ahmedabad)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIM Ahmedabad) has officially announced the Research Associate (Post-Doctoral) Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Candidates holding a Ph.D. in Information Systems, Management, Economics, Public Administration, or closely related fields, including applicants who have recently submitted their thesis or are nearing completion of their Ph.D., can submit their online applications on or before 05 August 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and apply online are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Information Systems, Management, Economics, Public Administration or closely related fields. Applicants who have recently submitted their thesis or are nearing completion of their PhD are also eligible to apply.
qualification.details: PhD in Information Systems, Management, Economics, Public Administration or closely related fields. Applicants who have recently submitted their thesis or are nearing completion of their PhD are also eligible to apply. Strong background in quantitative, qualitative, and/or mixed-methods research. Experience with statistical analysis using R, Python, Stata, SPSS, or similar software. Excellent academic writing and communication skills. Demonstrated research potential through journal and conference publications.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Ahmedabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Ahmedabad Post Doctoral Research Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIM Ahmedabad Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIM Ahmedabad Research Associate (Post-Doctoral) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIM Ahmedabad Post Doctoral Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IIM Ahmedabad Post Doctoral Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: PhD in Information Systems, Management, Economics, Public Administration or closely related fields. Applicants who have recently submitted their thesis or are nearing completion of their PhD are also eligible to apply. Strong background in quantitative, qualitative, and/or mixed-methods research. Experience with statistical analysis using R, Python, Stata, SPSS, or similar software. Excellent academic writing and communication skills. Demonstrated research potential through journal and conference publications.

content_sections.heading: IIM Ahmedabad Post Doctoral Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIM Ahmedabad Post Doctoral Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Ahmedabad to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Ahmedabad Post Doctoral Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Ahmedabad Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Research Associate (Post-Doctoral) position at IIM Ahmedabad is 05-08-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a PhD in Information Systems, Management, Economics, Public Administration or closely related fields. Applicants nearing completion of their PhD are also eligible.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Online.

faq.question: Q5. What is the type of job offered?
faq.answer: The job type for the Research Associate (Post-Doctoral) position is Contractual.

faq.question: Q6. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIM Ahmedabad).

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate (Post-Doctoral) position.

faq.question: Q8. What are the key skills required for this role?
faq.answer: Key skills include a strong background in quantitative, qualitative, and/or mixed-methods research, experience with statistical analysis software, and excellent academic writing and communication skills.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the apply online link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
